title: node-postgres Pool, Client Ownership, Transactions, and Shutdown · Diagnostic Repair Bay
summary: A preserved TypeScript feed-service trace contains one plausible discovery, URL, XML, validator, Fetch, stream, SQL, transaction, Promise, lease, Express, accessibility, migration, or release defect; find the earliest invalid transition before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in bounded pg repository and transaction port and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal d…
objectives: Create one bounded Pool, handle background errors, observe acquire waits, reject work during closure, and await pool.end after workers settle.
Release every successfully acquired client in finally, preserve the original error, and test error, cancellation, and shutdown paths.
Run BEGIN, every statement, COMMIT or ROLLBACK on the same checked-out client and prohibit pool.query inside the unit of work.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Feed Ts Pool Lifecycle
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug TypeScript team handles case 4372 during an inclusive cross-device research reader review. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove Pool, checked-out client, transaction connection, row validation, error, and close ownership; the release claim must bind source, compiler, emitted JavaScript, migrations, lockfile, package, image, configuration, and restored state; then change one emitted artifact, package, container, incident, backup, restore, rollback, or capacity condition and reconcile evidence. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Create one bounded Pool, handle background errors, observe acquire waits, reject work during closure, and await pool.end after workers settle.

steps.instruction:
